description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage containing a job named bats that extends the .base_tpl template and is allowed to fail. In the bats job, run a series of echo commands that output red-colored warning emojis and a deprecation notice, then execute `docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/code/" -v "/tmp:/tmp_ro":ro bats/bats:latest /code/test`, and finally run `false` to force a failure. The job runs in the test stage, has no explicit image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules, and is marked with allow_failure:true.
